key_files.relevance: Top-level state owner: pubkey, signer, selectedGroupId; gates authenticated UI; passes currentUserPubkey to Board
MarmotProvider context: exposes pubkey, groups, client; useGroup hook filters by idStr; re-inits on signer change
Group sidebar: calls getGroupMembers for selected group, renders member list, leave button with AlertDialog confirmation
Task board: consumes TaskStoreContext, renders columns with data-column, delete confirmation AlertDialog, loading skeleton
Task card: receives currentUserPubkey as prop, conditionally renders assign/unassign buttons based on pubkey match
TaskStoreProvider: loads events from IndexedDB by groupId, dispatch applies optimistically then sends to MLS (no-op if group undefined)
IndexedDB event log keyed by groupId only (not pubkey-scoped)
groupHasMember() helper: boolean membership check using getGroupMembers; useDeviceSync hook lifecycle
IndexedDB store factory: all stores identity-blind (no pubkey prefix)
Radix AlertDialog primitive: existing modal/overlay infrastructure for confirmations
Radix Dialog primitive: used in NpubQrModal, available for overlay patterns
Button disabled state: disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 via Tailwind

patterns.name: Null-check top-level gate
patterns.description: if (!pubkey) return <ConnectScreen/> gates entire authenticated UI

patterns.name: Prop-drilled pubkey
patterns.description: currentUserPubkey flows Page → Board → TaskCard as explicit props

patterns.name: Context pubkey
patterns.description: selfPubkey available via useMarmot().pubkey in any component under MarmotProvider

patterns.name: Conditional buttons
patterns.description: TaskCard renders action buttons only when pubkey conditions are met

patterns.name: AlertDialog confirmation
patterns.description: Radix AlertDialog with open={pendingState !== null} for destructive actions

patterns.name: Loading skeleton
patterns.description: Board renders full skeleton UI with animate-pulse when loading

patterns.name: Cancelled-flag pattern
patterns.description: Async useEffect handlers use let cancelled = false guard

similar_features.name: Conditional button rendering in TaskCard
similar_features.description: Assign/unassign buttons shown only when pubkey matches/doesn't match assignee

similar_features.name: Leave group confirmation
similar_features.description: AlertDialog modal for destructive leave action with pending state management

similar_features.name: Mobile drawer backdrop
similar_features.description: fixed inset-0 z-20 bg-black/50 overlay div as click-catcher

architecture.context_hierarchy: ThemeProvider → Page (pubkey, selectedGroupId) → MarmotProvider (client, groups, signer, pubkey) → [GroupManager, TaskStoreProvider → Board]
architecture.identity_boundary: Pubkey lives in Page state, passed as prop to MarmotProvider. MarmotProvider only renders when pubkey is non-null.
architecture.storage_namespacing: All IndexedDB stores and localStorage keys are identity-blind — no pubkey prefix. Two identities on same browser share same group-state and task event logs.
architecture.group_selection_flow: GroupManager lifts selection to Page → Page stores in state + localStorage → Page passes groupId to TaskStoreProvider → TaskStoreProvider loads events from IndexedDB

extension_points: MarmotContext can be extended to expose detachedGroupIds Set
GroupManager already has members state per selected group; can compute isDetached per group
Board receives currentUserPubkey as prop; can also receive isDetached boolean
TaskStoreProvider dispatch can be wrapped to no-op when detached
conventions: Tailwind CSS v4 only, no CSS modules
data-testid on interactive elements for E2E
idb-keyval via createKVStore for all IndexedDB access
